nasb.text: Our fathers were unwilling to be obedient to him, but repudiated him and in their hearts turned back to Egypt,

esv.text: Our fathers refused to obey him, but thrust him aside, and in their hearts they turned to Egypt,

cnv.text: 我們的祖先不肯聽從他，反而把他推開，他們的心已經轉向了埃及，

ccb.text: “可是我们的祖先不听从他，甚至弃绝他，心里对埃及恋恋不舍。

csbs.text: 我们的祖先不肯顺从，反而弃绝了他，甚至在心里转回埃及去，
